boss.name: The Flint

small.name: Small Blind
small.tag_effect: Gives $1 per unused discard this run (Will give $17)

value.effect: (lvl.1) Level up Three of a Kind +2 Mult and +20 chips
(lvl.2) Level up Straight +3 Mult and +30 chips
(lvl.1) Level up High Card +1 Mult and +10 chips
Enhances 1 selected card into a Glass Card
Reroll Boss Blind 1 time per Ante, $10 per roll
+10 chips 1 in 5 chance for +20 Mult 1 in 15 chance to win $20
This Joker gains X0.25 Mult every time a playing card is added to your deck (Currently X1 Mult)
(lvl.1) Level up Flush +2 Mult and +15 chips
